news:news.news:title: Escalating violence in Lebanon and ongoing geopolitical tensions are raising concerns about stability in the region and impacting global oil prices.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict updates, US-Iran relations, environmental policy changes, international rescue operations, global oil price trends

news:news.news:title: Oil prices are rising amid concerns over the stability of a ceasefire in the Middle East, affecting global markets and airline fares.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East oil market volatility, impact of oil prices on airlines, job market challenges in Washington D.C., global economic implications of Iran conflict, music industry takeover news

news:news.news:title: Tesla plans to revive its smaller, more affordable EV model while various tech companies introduce new features and face regulatory scrutiny.
news:news.news:keywords: Tesla's new EV plans, Fubo mobile app updates, Ticketmaster legal issues, AI industry challenges, Waymo pothole assistance

news:news.news:title: The Masters Tournament has begun, while the NBA's Oklahoma City Thunder secured the top playoff seed and MLB salaries reached a record average of $5.34 million.
news:news.news:keywords: Masters Tournament 2026 updates, NBA playoff seedings, MLB salary records, NCAA eligibility discussions, NFL draft insights

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into health, genetics, and human history, including new anti-inflammatory compounds and the origins of human migration.
news:news.news:keywords: anti-inflammatory plant compounds, weight loss drugs and muscle loss, genetic code and gene silencing, gut bacteria and neurological diseases, human migration history

news:news.news:title: The US-Iran ceasefire has shifted global perceptions of the US, while ongoing conflicts in Lebanon and Nigeria highlight regional instability.
news:news.news:keywords: US-Iran relations and ceasefire, Lebanon conflict updates, Nigeria terrorism trial news, Germany military policy changes, Greece social media regulations

news:news.news:title: Oil prices fell sharply while stocks rose following a conditional ceasefire announcement between the US and Iran, though shipping impacts remain limited.
news:news.news:keywords: Oil price fluctuations, Impact of US-Iran relations on markets, Job market challenges in Washington DC, Universal Music Group takeover news, Airline fare increases due to oil prices

news:news.news:title: Google's Gemini introduces notebooks for project organization, while Meta reenters the AI space with a new model called Muse Spark.
news:news.news:keywords: Google Gemini notebooks feature, Dyson handheld fan release, Meta AI model Muse Spark, Microsoft executive changes, SSD price increases due to RAM shortage

news:news.news:title: The Oklahoma City Thunder secured the No. 1 seed in the NBA playoffs, while Scottie Scheffler and Bryson DeChambeau make headlines at the Masters.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA playoffs update, Masters golf tournament news, NCAA eligibility changes, UCLA women's basketball championship, 3D printing in sports equipment

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a new lunar crater, insights into proton movement, and breakthroughs in male contraception and brain mapping.
news:news.news:keywords: lunar discoveries, proton transport, male contraception, brain mapping techniques, evolutionary biology

news:news.news:title: US-Iran Ceasefire Reshapes Global Views as Oil Prices Plunge and Stocks Rally
